name: beads-task-json-handoff-research
title: Research Beads handoff for Trellis task.json
description: Research whether Trellis task.json files can be handed off to Beads as a task graph or issue backend, and recommend an integration approach.
creator: cses-38
notes: Research conclusion: raw Trellis task.json cannot be consumed directly by Beads; a conversion/export layer is needed. If Beads becomes the backend, generate the Beads issue first and materialize the Trellis task directory as a working copy.

meta.recommended_option: opt-in beads-first backend with trellis workspace materialization
